sql: SELECT d1.name, d1.id, d1.floor_number, d1.budget FROM departments AS d1

SELECT d1.department, d1.hire_date, d1.email FROM doctors AS d1

SELECT a1.notes FROM appointments AS a1
SELECT l1.id, l1.is_abnormal FROM lab_results AS l1

SELECT * FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.floor_number >= 676 LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM patients AS p1 ORDER BY p1.insurance_id

SELECT p1.gender, p1.id FROM patients AS p1
SELECT * FROM patients AS p1 ORDER BY p1.date_of_birth LIMIT 63
SELECT d1.head_doctor_id FROM departments AS d1
SELECT a1.scheduled_at, a1.patient_id, a1.duration_minutes, a1.doctor_id FROM appointments AS a1
SELECT * FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE d1.last_name = 'user' LIMIT 86
SELECT d1.floor_number, d1.id FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.floor_number > 279 LIMIT 91
SELECT d1.email FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE d1.specialization LIKE 'b%' LIMIT 58
SELECT * FROM patients AS p1 RIGHT JOIN appointments AS a9 ON p1.id = a9.patient_id WHERE a9.created_at < DATETIME('now', '-24 days')
SELECT * FROM prescriptions AS p1 FULL JOIN doctors AS d6 ON p1.doctor_id = d6.id WHERE d6.hire_date <= DATETIME('now', '-10 days')
SELECT * FROM patients AS p1 INNER JOIN lab_results AS l9 ON p1.id = l9.patient_id
SELECT p8.date_of_birth, p8.first_name, l1.patient_id, l1.test_date FROM lab_results AS l1 FULL JOIN patients AS p8 ON l1.patient_id = p8.id WHERE p8.gender <> 'activity'
SELECT * FROM patients AS p1 LEFT JOIN prescriptions AS p4 ON p1.id = p4.patient_id
SELECT * FROM prescriptions AS p1 INNER JOIN patients AS p8 ON p1.patient_id = p8.id WHERE p8.id = 510
SELECT * FROM departments AS d1 RIGHT JOIN doctors AS d1 ON d1.head_doctor_id = d1.id
SELECT * FROM doctors AS d1 LEFT JOIN departments AS d9 ON d1.id = d9.head_doctor_id
SELECT l1.test_date, l1.test_name, l1.result_value, p7.last_name FROM lab_results AS l1 FULL JOIN patients AS p7 ON l1.patient_id = p7.id
SELECT p1.is_active, a1.notes, p1.first_name, a1.doctor_id FROM appointments AS a1 RIGHT JOIN patients AS p1 ON a1.patient_id = p1.id WHERE p1.last_name LIKE '%c'
SELECT * FROM patients AS p1 LEFT JOIN prescriptions AS p3 ON p1.id = p3.patient_id
SELECT * FROM lab_results AS l1 LEFT JOIN doctors AS d3 ON l1.doctor_id = d3.id
SELECT d1.budget, d7.last_name, d7.is_active, d1.head_doctor_id FROM departments AS d1 RIGHT JOIN doctors AS d7 ON d1.head_doctor_id = d7.id
SELECT d8.budget, d8.head_doctor_id, d1.first_name, d1.is_active FROM doctors AS d1 INNER JOIN departments AS d8 ON d1.id = d8.head_doctor_id
SELECT * FROM prescriptions AS p1 INNER JOIN patients AS p8 ON p1.patient_id = p8.id
SELECT a1.status, d9.last_name, d9.hire_date, d9.is_active FROM appointments AS a1 INNER JOIN doctors AS d9 ON a1.doctor_id = d9.id WHERE d9.id > 377
SELECT * FROM prescriptions AS p1 INNER JOIN doctors AS d7 ON p1.doctor_id = d7.id
SELECT * FROM appointments AS a1 RIGHT JOIN patients AS p8 ON a1.patient_id = p8.id
SELECT * FROM doctors AS d1 INNER JOIN appointments AS a2 ON d1.id = a2.doctor_id WHERE a2.created_at >= DATETIME('now', '-27 days')
SELECT * FROM doctors AS d1 LEFT JOIN lab_results AS l1 ON d1.id = l1.doctor_id WHERE l1.doctor_id > 91
SELECT a1.notes, a1.patient_id, a1.created_at, d5.hire_date FROM appointments AS a1 LEFT JOIN doctors AS d5 ON a1.doctor_id = d5.id WHERE d5.hire_date > DATETIME('now', '-11 days')
SELECT p1.dosage, p2.insurance_provider, p2.id, p1.doctor_id FROM prescriptions AS p1 INNER JOIN patients AS p2 ON p1.patient_id = p2.id
SELECT l1.notes, l1.id, l1.is_abnormal, p5.first_name FROM lab_results AS l1 INNER JOIN patients AS p5 ON l1.patient_id = p5.id
SELECT * FROM doctors AS d1 RIGHT JOIN lab_results AS l8 ON d1.id = l8.doctor_id WHERE l8.result_unit = '123'
SELECT p1.is_active, p2.patient_id, p2.dosage, p2.start_date FROM patients AS p1 RIGHT JOIN prescriptions AS p2 ON p1.id = p2.patient_id WHERE p2.start_date > DATETIME('now', '-1 days')
SELECT p1.id, p1.frequency, p1.medication_name, d7.specialization FROM prescriptions AS p1 FULL JOIN doctors AS d7 ON p1.doctor_id = d7.id
SELECT * FROM doctors AS d1 FULL JOIN departments AS d6 ON d1.id = d6.head_doctor_id WHERE d6.budget <> 433
SELECT * FROM lab_results AS l1 LEFT JOIN doctors AS d4 ON l1.doctor_id = d4.id WHERE d4.is_active = 1
SELECT * FROM prescriptions AS p1 FULL JOIN doctors AS d3 ON p1.doctor_id = d3.id
SELECT l1.test_date, d2.first_name, d2.department, d2.email FROM lab_results AS l1 RIGHT JOIN doctors AS d2 ON l1.doctor_id = d2.id WHERE d2.department <> 'activity'
SELECT * FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.patient_id IN (SELECT sub_p.id FROM patients AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.insurance_provider LIKE 'b%')
SELECT l1.is_abnormal FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.patient_id IN (SELECT sub_p.id FROM patients AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.date_of_birth >= DATETIME('now', '-23 days'))
SELECT d1.first_name, d1.last_name, d1.specialization FROM doctors AS d1 JOIN doctors AS d2 ON d1.id = d2.id AND d1.id <> d2.id LIMIT 16
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM appointments AS inner_appointments WHERE inner_appointments.id <> 943) AS derived_table
SELECT d1.floor_number, d1.id FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.head_doctor_id IN (SELECT sub_d.id FROM doctors AS sub_d WHERE sub_d.email LIKE 'user%@%')
SELECT p1.phone_number, p1.email FROM patients AS p1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM lab_results AS sub_l WHERE sub_l.patient_id = p1.id AND sub_l.patient_id >= 155)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM prescriptions AS inner_prescriptions WHERE inner_prescriptions.frequency = 'activity') AS derived_table
SELECT p1.doctor_id, p1.id, p1.medication_name, p1.dosage FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.doctor_id IN (SELECT sub_d.id FROM doctors AS sub_d WHERE sub_d.first_name LIKE '%c')
SELECT l1.is_abnormal FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.patient_id IN (SELECT sub_p.id FROM patients AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.phone_number = 'user')
SELECT p1.id, p1.patient_id, p1.doctor_id FROM prescriptions AS p1 JOIN prescriptions AS p2 ON p1.patient_id = p2.patient_id AND p1.id <> p2.id
SELECT l1.id, l1.patient_id, l1.doctor_id FROM lab_results AS l1 JOIN lab_results AS l2 ON l1.patient_id = l2.patient_id AND l1.id <> l2.id
SELECT a1.status, a1.doctor_id, a1.duration_minutes, a1.id FROM appointments AS a1 WHERE a1.patient_id IN (SELECT sub_p.id FROM patients AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.email = 'user94@example.com')
SELECT * FROM appointments AS a1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM patients AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.id = a1.patient_id AND sub_p.last_name LIKE '%a%')
SELECT l1.id FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.patient_id IN (SELECT sub_p.id FROM patients AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.phone_number <> 'admin')
SELECT p1.is_active, p1.start_date, p1.doctor_id, p1.end_date FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.doctor_id IN (SELECT sub_d.id FROM doctors AS sub_d WHERE sub_d.department <> 'activity')
SELECT d1.id FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM prescriptions AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.doctor_id = d1.id AND sub_p.doctor_id > 574)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM lab_results AS inner_lab_results WHERE inner_lab_results.result_unit <> 'user') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.test_name = 'user'
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM lab_results AS inner_lab_results WHERE inner_lab_results.result_value <> 405) AS derived_table
SELECT p1.frequency, p1.doctor_id FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.patient_id IN (SELECT sub_p.id FROM patients AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.admitted_on <= DATETIME('now', '-26 days'))
SELECT p1.patient_id, p1.frequency, p1.id, p1.medication_name FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.patient_id IN (SELECT sub_p.id FROM patients AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.insurance_id = '123')
SELECT p1.id FROM patients AS p1 WHERE p1.id IN (SELECT sub_l.patient_id FROM lab_results AS sub_l WHERE sub_l.doctor_id <= 870)
SELECT p1.id, p1.gender FROM patients AS p1 WHERE p1.id IN (SELECT sub_a.patient_id FROM appointments AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.created_at > DATETIME('now', '-26 days'))
SELECT * FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM prescriptions AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.doctor_id = d1.id AND sub_p.patient_id <= 839)
SELECT d1.last_name FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE d1.id IN (SELECT sub_p.doctor_id FROM prescriptions AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.end_date < DATETIME('now', '-20 days'))
SELECT l1.id, l1.patient_id, l1.doctor_id FROM lab_results AS l1 JOIN lab_results AS l2 ON l1.patient_id = l2.patient_id AND l1.id <> l2.id
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM doctors AS inner_doctors WHERE inner_doctors.specialization <> 'user') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.id = 77
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM patients AS inner_patients WHERE inner_patients.insurance_id LIKE '%a%') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.admitted_on < DATETIME('now', '-11 days')
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM departments AS inner_departments WHERE inner_departments.id < 466) AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM patients AS inner_patients WHERE inner_patients.last_name = 'user') AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM patients AS inner_patients WHERE inner_patients.gender = 'admin') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.last_name LIKE '%a%'
SELECT p1.insurance_id, p1.id FROM patients AS p1 WHERE p1.gender <> 'test' UNION SELECT p2.insurance_id, p2.id FROM patients AS p2 WHERE p2.is_active = 0
SELECT p1.frequency, p1.end_date FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.frequency <> 'admin' UNION SELECT p2.frequency, p2.end_date FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.frequency = 'activity'

SELECT l1.doctor_id, l1.test_date, l1.result_unit FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.is_abnormal = 0 UNION ALL SELECT l2.doctor_id, l2.test_date, l2.result_unit FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.test_date >= DATETIME('now', '-23 days') LIMIT 34

SELECT d1.is_active, d1.specialization, d1.id FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE d1.hire_date > DATETIME('now', '-16 days') UNION ALL SELECT d2.is_active, d2.specialization, d2.id FROM doctors AS d2 WHERE d2.id >= 546

SELECT d1.is_active, d1.department, d1.first_name FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE d1.email LIKE '%@gmail.com' UNION ALL SELECT d2.is_active, d2.department, d2.first_name FROM doctors AS d2 WHERE d2.is_active = 0 ORDER BY is_active LIMIT 18
SELECT d1.specialization, d1.last_name FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE d1.hire_date > DATETIME('now', '-23 days') UNION SELECT d2.specialization, d2.last_name FROM doctors AS d2 WHERE d2.id >= 410

SELECT p1.insurance_id, p1.gender, p1.last_name FROM patients AS p1 WHERE p1.first_name LIKE 'b%' UNION SELECT p2.insurance_id, p2.gender, p2.last_name FROM patients AS p2 WHERE p2.phone_number = 'activity'
SELECT d1.name, d1.floor_number, d1.id FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.id > 938 UNION SELECT d2.name, d2.floor_number, d2.id FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.floor_number > 338
SELECT d1.specialization, d1.department, d1.email FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE d1.last_name = 'admin' UNION ALL SELECT d2.specialization, d2.department, d2.email FROM doctors AS d2 WHERE d2.is_active = 0
SELECT p1.doctor_id, p1.dosage FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.frequency LIKE 'b%' UNION ALL SELECT p2.doctor_id, p2.dosage FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.patient_id >= 424

SELECT l1.test_date, l1.is_abnormal, l1.result_unit FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.result_unit <> 'test' UNION SELECT l2.test_date, l2.is_abnormal, l2.result_unit FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.result_value = 959 ORDER BY test_date

SELECT p1.id, p1.end_date, p1.frequency FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.start_date < DATETIME('now', '-29 days') UNION SELECT p2.id, p2.end_date, p2.frequency FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.start_date <= DATETIME('now', '-16 days') ORDER BY id LIMIT 23
SELECT d1.id, d1.name, d1.is_active FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.is_active = 0 UNION ALL SELECT d2.id, d2.name, d2.is_active FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.id > 39

SELECT d1.email, d1.id, d1.hire_date, d1.last_name FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE d1.is_active = 0 UNION SELECT d2.email, d2.id, d2.hire_date, d2.last_name FROM doctors AS d2 WHERE d2.last_name LIKE '%c' ORDER BY email
SELECT d1.is_active, d1.first_name FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE d1.email <> 'user27@example.com' UNION SELECT d2.is_active, d2.first_name FROM doctors AS d2 WHERE d2.last_name LIKE '%a%'
SELECT d1.budget, d1.floor_number FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.floor_number <> 782 UNION SELECT d2.budget, d2.floor_number FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.name LIKE 'b%' ORDER BY budget LIMIT 10

SELECT d1.id, d1.head_doctor_id, d1.budget, d1.name FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.name = 'user' UNION SELECT d2.id, d2.head_doctor_id, d2.budget, d2.name FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.is_active = 1
SELECT l1.id, l1.test_date FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.patient_id < 755 UNION SELECT l2.id, l2.test_date FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.notes = 'activity' ORDER BY id
SELECT l1.notes, l1.test_date, l1.patient_id FROM lab_results AS l1 WHERE l1.result_value > 141 UNION SELECT l2.notes, l2.test_date, l2.patient_id FROM lab_results AS l2 WHERE l2.id = 565 LIMIT 39
SELECT d1.department, d1.specialization FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE d1.email = 'user24@example.com' UNION ALL SELECT d2.department, d2.specialization FROM doctors AS d2 WHERE d2.is_active = 1
SELECT d1.name, d1.id, d1.budget FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.is_active = 0 UNION SELECT d2.name, d2.id, d2.budget FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.name = 'user' ORDER BY name

SELECT p1.doctor_id, p1.id, p1.frequency FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.start_date <= DATETIME('now', '-9 days') UNION SELECT p2.doctor_id, p2.id, p2.frequency FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.end_date <= DATETIME('now', '-18 days')

SELECT a1.id, a1.created_at, a1.doctor_id, a1.scheduled_at FROM appointments AS a1 WHERE a1.patient_id < 435 UNION SELECT a2.id, a2.created_at, a2.doctor_id, a2.scheduled_at FROM appointments AS a2 WHERE a2.id < 388 LIMIT 16

SELECT a1.status, a1.id, a1.created_at, a1.duration_minutes FROM appointments AS a1 WHERE a1.created_at < DATETIME('now', '-12 days') UNION ALL SELECT a2.status, a2.id, a2.created_at, a2.duration_minutes FROM appointments AS a2 WHERE a2.doctor_id = 787 LIMIT 13
SELECT d1.name, d1.floor_number FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.head_doctor_id = 569 UNION ALL SELECT d2.name, d2.floor_number FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.is_active = 1

SELECT d1.specialization, d1.last_name, d1.first_name FROM doctors AS d1 WHERE d1.is_active = 0 UNION SELECT d2.specialization, d2.last_name, d2.first_name FROM doctors AS d2 WHERE d2.department = 'user' LIMIT 22

SELECT d1.name, d1.head_doctor_id, d1.id, d1.is_active FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.floor_number > 365 UNION SELECT d2.name, d2.head_doctor_id, d2.id, d2.is_active FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.budget >= 215
SELECT d1.is_active, d1.floor_number FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.budget <= 256 UNION SELECT d2.is_active, d2.floor_number FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.floor_number >= 151

SELECT d1.head_doctor_id, d1.is_active, d1.id, d1.budget FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.name LIKE '%a%' UNION ALL SELECT d2.head_doctor_id, d2.is_active, d2.id, d2.budget FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.budget = 557 ORDER BY head_doctor_id

SELECT p1.end_date, p1.start_date, p1.medication_name, p1.doctor_id FROM prescriptions AS p1 WHERE p1.patient_id >= 979 UNION SELECT p2.end_date, p2.start_date, p2.medication_name, p2.doctor_id FROM prescriptions AS p2 WHERE p2.id >= 907 ORDER BY end_date

UPDATE prescriptions SET medication_name = 'Updated text 6' WHERE prescriptions.id = 329
UPDATE lab_results SET patient_id = 268 WHERE lab_results.result_value <> 562
UPDATE patients SET is_active = 0 WHERE patients.date_of_birth >= DATETIME('now', '-29 days')
UPDATE appointments SET duration_minutes = 861 WHERE appointments.id <> 958
UPDATE patients SET insurance_id = 'Updated text 1' WHERE patients.admitted_on <= DATETIME('now', '-11 days')

UPDATE prescriptions SET start_date = DATETIME('now') WHERE prescriptions.doctor_id = 348

UPDATE appointments SET duration_minutes = 674 WHERE appointments.duration_minutes > 408
